creator: mi@kot.ne.mediaone.net
text:
The naim.1 file that comes with the software is empty. The port
	blindly installs that into ${PREFIX}/man/man1, compresses to
	20 bytes and leaves at that.

Fix: 

Patch the software to not install the empty man page...
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install the port, `man naim'
